cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/listkit/__init__.py b/listkit/__init__.py
index 21544c7..7bee9c5 100644
--- a/listkit/__init__.py
+++ b/listkit/__init__.py
@@ -13,3 +13,9 @@ def dedupe(items):
 
 def without(items, value):
     return [x for x in items if x != value]
+
+def move_to_front(items, value):
+    rest = [x for x in items if x != value]
+    if len(rest) == len(items):
+        return rest
+    return [value] + rest

cases.name: mutates_input
cases.diff:
diff --git a/listkit/__init__.py b/listkit/__init__.py
index 21544c7..3e0d436 100644
--- a/listkit/__init__.py
+++ b/listkit/__init__.py
@@ -13,3 +13,9 @@ def dedupe(items):
 
 def without(items, value):
     return [x for x in items if x != value]
+
+def move_to_front(items, value):
+    if value in items:
+        items.remove(value)
+        items.insert(0, value)
+    return items

cases.name: crashes_on_absent
cases.diff:
diff --git a/listkit/__init__.py b/listkit/__init__.py
index 21544c7..f5b3713 100644
--- a/listkit/__init__.py
+++ b/listkit/__init__.py
@@ -13,3 +13,7 @@ def dedupe(items):
 
 def without(items, value):
     return [x for x in items if x != value]
+
+def move_to_front(items, value):
+    items.remove(value)
+    return [value] + items
